subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Master, my Hope! This, Thy servant, hath supplicated before the threshold of Thy Gate of forgiveness, before which he doth prostrate himself [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و سیدی و رجائی هذا عبدک قد تضرع الی حضره باب حطتک التی من سجد لها
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
